content: It is that indestructible matrix upon which the character is built, and whose shape it must take and keep throughout life.
options: Human character is built on nothing but that indestructible matrix. It takes the shape of that matrix and keeps it for a lifetime.
Character is built on an indestructible matrix, which must take the shape of the character and keep that character during one’s life.
The indestructible matrix is built on character, takes the shape of character and keeps the character throughout life.
The indestructible matrix is built on character, which takes the shape of the matrix and keeps it life long.

content: Each man sees himself as unique, and so far as he is concerned, the hub of the universe, different from any other individual.
options: According to him, each man is a unique hub of the universe, which is different from other universe.
Each man sees himself as unique, since he is the center of the universe different from other centers.
According to him, each man views himself as a unique individual different from the hub of the universe.
Each man sees himself as a special individual, and in his eyes, he is the center of the universe, and different from any other individual.

content: ... but each must interpret events and fit them into the mosaic of his own life’s pattern.
options: ...but each man must be the interpreter of social events and integrate the experiences into his life story.
...but each of the two people must interpret the events into different language and adapt them to their complex life pattern.
...but each person must have his own understanding of social happenings and make them contribute to the diversity of his individual life pattern.
...but each of the two people must create their own version of the happenings and make it an episode of his life story.

content: The outer man, too, was originally perfect, but man has so desecrated and abused it that today it is a far cry from the original model.
options: Man’s personality and physical body have been desecrated and defiled so much by the universal force that they are crying for perfection from afar.
Man’s physical body has been so defiled and damaged that it is very different from what it could be.
The living beings from the outer universe are very different from what they used to be due to the human beings abuse and desecration.
The living beings from the outer universe are imperfect, and this was caused by the ignorance and abuse of creatures on earth. They are crying to return to their hometowns.

content: Human nature is ever true to itself, not to systems of faith or education.
options: Human nature is loyal to itself, rather than to any systems of faith or external teachings.
Human nature is the master of itself and the systems of faith or education.
Human nature is faithful only to its master, who has little control over systems of faith or education.
Human nature never lies to itself, nor to systems of religion or education.

content: Each holds to the structure of the mold into which the soul was cast at the time of its individualization.
options: Each man sticks to the structure of a mold which is cast by his individual soul.
Each human nature bears the characteristics of a mold where the soul is formed with individuality.
A person’s nature is formed when their soul is given individual shape.
Each man develops the individual soul by embracing the structure of a special mold.

content: Man’s majesty and nobility are taken for granted, although his faults and weaknesses are constantly paraded before his eyes.
options: People respect greatness and nobility in human nature much more than they do to faults and weakness, when they are on parade.
Human beings are undoubtedly seen as great and noble, although they often behave badly.
People pay no attention to the great and noble side of human nature, since they are more interested in the parade of those with faults and weakness in nature.
Human beings have so many faults and weaknesses that we all ignore their goodness.

content: Daily one reads of men saving others at the peril of their own lives.
options: There’s an article about how a man saves others at the cost of his own life on a daily basis.
Everyday, we all read about men saving others at the risk of their own lives.
People should read a story everyday of a man saving others at the expense of his own life .
At regular intervals, people should read in newspapers of how men lose their lives while saving others.
